index.title: Introduction
index.description: Overview of the Year Zero Engine: core concepts, dice, tools, and key features.

attributes-and-skills.title: Attributes & Skills
attributes-and-skills.description: Character creation: archetypes, attributes (dice pool and step dice), die types, and starting skills.

specialties-gear-and-experience.title: Specialties, Gear & Experience
specialties-gear-and-experience.description: Specialties, personality traits, gear, encumbrance, consumables, and spending XP.

rolling-and-pushing.title: Rolling Dice & Pushing
rolling-and-pushing.description: The twelve core skills, how to roll dice, successes, failure, pushing rolls, panic, and modifiers.

gear-and-skill-list.title: Gear, Opposed Rolls & Skill Descriptions
gear-and-skill-list.description: Gear bonuses, degradation, reliability, artifact dice, opposed rolls, NPCs, and descriptions of all twelve skills.

specialties.title: Specialties
specialties.description: Sample general specialties (Bodyguard through Weapon Specialist) and magic specialties.

maps-and-initiative.title: Maps, Zones & Initiative
maps-and-initiative.description: Combat maps, zone features, range categories, rounds, initiative, and the turn structure.

actions-and-combat.title: Actions & Combat
actions-and-combat.description: Slow and fast actions, movement, retreat, ambushes, close combat, ranged combat, overwatch, and weapons.

weapons-and-damage.title: Weapons, Damage & Conditions
weapons-and-damage.description: Weapon table, suffering damage and stress, body armor, cover, conditions, broken characters, and critical injury triggers.

critical-injuries.title: Critical Injuries
critical-injuries.description: Rolling for critical injuries, death, healing crits, physical critical injury table, and mental critical injury table.

hazards-and-vehicles.title: Hazards & Vehicles
hazards-and-vehicles.description: Environmental hazards (darkness, fire, explosions, falling, drowning, poison, disease, cold, starvation, sleep), mounts, and vehicles.

chases.title: Chases
chases.description: Chase rules: starting a chase, maneuvers, obstacles, and multi-participant chases.

index.title: Magic
index.description: Magic rules: spell ranks, casting, Willpower Points, overcharging, mishaps, and general spells.

awareness.title: Awareness
awareness.description: Druidic Awareness discipline: sight, hearing, farsight, past visions, divination, intuition, and telepathy spells.

healing-and-shapeshifting.title: Healing & Shapeshifting
healing-and-shapeshifting.description: Druidic Healing and Shapeshifting disciplines: healing hands, mend wounds, resurrection, animal speech, animal form, and related spells.

blood-and-death-magic.title: Blood Magic & Death Magic
blood-and-death-magic.description: Sorcery disciplines: Blood Magic (bind demon, immolate, blood curse) and Death Magic (raise the dead, steal life, terror).

elementalism-and-symbolism.title: Elementalism & Symbolism
elementalism-and-symbolism.description: Sorcery disciplines: Elementalism (fireball, stoneskin, tornado, flood wave) and Symbolism (entice, illusion, puppeteer, portal).

index.title: Travel
index.description: Travel rules: maps, terrain types, tasks, weather, marching, driving, and navigation.

survival-tasks.title: Survival Tasks
survival-tasks.description: Keeping watch, foraging, hunting, fishing, making camp, cooking, sleeping, exploring, resting, and water travel.
